items.headline: MCP enforcement fix warrants an ADO test run
items.body: Claude Code 2.1.169 ships bug fixes to MCP policy enforcement — the kind of silent change that can alter how a server's tools get filtered or surfaced. ADO MCP Server should be spot-checked against the updated behavior before assuming nothing changed. The release also adds `/cd` to change directories mid-session while preserving the prompt cache, which helps in multi-repo flows.
